name: L1 Global Long Short Fund Limited
analysis: GLS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.9500, stop A$1.7226, target A$2.6322 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
